englishDefinitions: As a noun, the actors in a movie, play, or television show.
As a verb, to choose actors for roles in a production.
As a verb, to throw something, especially in a particular direction.
As a noun, a hard covering used to protect a broken bone while it heals.
examples: The cast of the show became very famous.
The director cast her as the main character.
He had a cast on his arm for six weeks.
